A dentist you'll trust from your very first visit

From implants to aesthetic treatment — we work with our own laboratory and equipment that lets us do things properly. Now accepting new patients.

Call us
Reception is available every working day.
doctor photo
Why us

What sets us apart

laboratory photo

We have our own dental laboratory

We prepare dental prosthetics in-house — no delays, we control quality from start to finish.

equipment photo

We see more than you do

We work with a 3D X-ray, microscope and intraoral scanner. The right diagnosis is everything.

PRF photo

Healing from your own blood

PRF therapy uses the patient's own blood for natural tissue regeneration after procedures.

nitrous oxide photo

Anxiety is not an obstacle

For patients who are afraid of treatment, we offer sedation with nitrous oxide.

The care you're looking for

implant photo

Implants

A permanent solution for missing teeth, made in our own laboratory.

Find out more →
PRF photo

PRF Therapy

Healing supported by the patient's own blood, fewer complications after procedures.

Find out more →
aesthetics photo

Aesthetic Dentistry

Veneers, crowns or composites — verified with a 3D scanner.

Find out more →
hygiene photo

Dental Hygiene

Extends the life of fillings, crowns and implants.

Find out more →

Reception

Frequently asked questions

I've had a bad experience at the dentist. How will it be this time?
We understand and take it seriously. That's why we work under a microscope, with precision and in a calm environment that gives you space too. And if the fear is too great, we have nitrous oxide.
I'm not sure I can afford it. How do I find out the price?
At the first consultation you'll receive a specific treatment plan with a clear price — before you decide. No commitments upfront.
I've been looking for a dentist for a long time and nobody will take me. Can I try with you?
Yes, new patients are welcome here. Just call +420 602 195 413 — reception is available every working day from 8:00 to 16:00.
Which insurance companies do you accept?
We have contracts with VZP (111), ČPZP (205), OZP (207), VoZP (201) and ZPMV (211). Non-standard procedures such as implants, aesthetics or whitening are paid directly — we will tell you the price in advance after consultation.

Call us. We'll handle the rest.

Reception will help you find an appointment and answer basic questions before your visit.

+420 602 195 413
Mon–Fri 8:00–16:00
1
You call — reception is available all working day.
2
An appointment that suits you is arranged.
3
On the day, the doctor explains everything and proposes a treatment plan.
